title: ActiveCampaign vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
